case_title: IP, CHI CHIU VS USASIA CASINO TOURS/ENTERTAINMENT INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY IP, CHI CHIU AS TO DEFENDANT USASIA CASINO TOURS/ENTERTAINMENT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-04-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 NO STIPULATION TO PRO TEM.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IP, CHI CHIU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT USASIA CASINO TOURS/ENTERTAINMENT INC. $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $382.00, DEFENDANT WAIVES IMPROPER SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLFT'S AND DEFT'S EXHIBITS IN CASE #810951.
